content.en:
this day.

The Infinite Heavenly Palace began to construct a void passage to allow other Supreme Dao Void Demons to enter this third-level battlefield, thereby reducing the pressure on the other battlefields.

However, the successful construction of the Void Passage is not so quick to do, and it still needs to be authorized.

However, the Wuji Heavenly Palace has already begun to issue orders, so that Taisu Palace and many other forces are ready to enter this third-level battlefield at any time to block the Dao Void Demon, and also promise many benefits.

The more Void Demons you kill, the more rewards you get.

For the Wuji Heavenly Palace, it is worth it to pay a little bit of resources that Wuji Heavenly Palace needs to ensure that the Wuji Heavenly Palace is not damaged.

Moreover, the Supreme Dao Void Demon was very terrifying, if the Supreme Dao Realm fell, it would be impossible to come to the Wuji Heavenly Palace to exchange resources, and they didn't even need to pay anything.

Taisu Palace and other forces were naturally extremely annoyed by the orders of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but they did not dare to disobey, and more or less had to send some to the Dao Realm.

Of course, it is not without benefits to kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon, for example, after killing the Supreme Dao Void Demon, you can obtain the resources on the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and some of the Supreme Dao Void Demons are still extremely high.

In addition, if you kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon and let the Supreme Dao Void Demon fall in this piece of heaven and earth, you will get a gift from the origin of heaven and earth, which can increase your cultivation.

It's a pity that the Supreme Dao Void Demon is too difficult to kill, and the rescue is fast, even if you kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon, you may be besieged and die, and there is no way to escape.

......

Before you know it, another period of time has passed.

At this time.

Taisu Palace and many other forces sent a group of people to the Dao Realm to enter the third-level battlefield True Dao Domain, but they all came in with battlefield orders.

The battlefield order can allow the Supreme Dao Realm to freely enter and exit the battlefield and the outside world, but it can only enter and exit at a specific portal, and once it dies, the battlefield order will be shattered, and it is impossible to snatch the battlefield orders of other Supreme Dao Realms out.

Wuji Heavenly Palace also sent some Supreme Dao Realms in, but they were all Supreme Dao Realms with little strength, and their potential was exhausted, and there was almost no hope of progress.

Anyone can see that these supreme realms are the waste of the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Taisu Battle City.

This is the newly built battle city of Taisu Palace in the third-level battlefield, many Dao realms can be attached to Taisu Palace, if you kill the Dao Void Demon, you can ask for rewards from Wuji Heavenly Palace from Taisu Palace.

Ye Tian also came here and was attached to Taisu Palace.

He didn't dare to be attached to the command of Wuji Palace, after all, he was wanted by Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Of course, he came to Taisu Palace with a Supreme Dao weapon mask, and used the eighth sequence of Supreme Dao rules to integrate into the mask, which could hide his aura and appearance, and it was not easy to be recognized.

Subsequently.

He applied for a pseudo-battlefield order from Taisu Battle City, which has similar functions to the battlefield except that he can't leave the battlefield.

"It won't be long before the Void Passage is completed, and the Supreme Dao Void Demons will come, kill as many Supreme Dao Void Demons as possible, and obtain the gift of the origin of heaven and earth, so that I can break through to the peak of the Dao Realm faster, otherwise, with my progress speed, I will become the peak of the First Dao Realm, I am afraid that it will take dozens of Supreme Dao eras, maybe the battlefield of the True Dao Domain has completely fallen by then!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

A few more days passed.

Somewhere in the True Dao Domain, a vast area began to shatter, forming a void passage that connected to the unknown beyond the Infinite Domain.

Airplanes!!!!

A large black figure stepped out of the void passage.

This is a five-fold supreme Dao Void Demon.

It took a deep breath, looked around again, determined that this was a third-level battlefield, showed an excited look, and immediately went back to report.

Soon.

A Supreme Dao Void Demon has come.

They didn't immediately invade the True Dao Domain, but waved their hands and sacrificed fortresses one after another.

Dense fortresses spread throughout this area, thus forming a majestic array that completely protected this void passage.

Rumble!!!!

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm Supreme Dao Void Demon soon came over, and then began to discuss how to invade the True Dao Domain.

Meanwhile.

Taisu Palace and other forces also knew that the Supreme Dao Void Demon had invaded, and their faces became solemn one by one.

The True Dao Mountain Lord was even more frightened, the Sixfold Dao Realm who came in from the outside world still had a way to escape, but he couldn't escape!

He's the most likely to fall!

......

The high-level leaders of Taisu Palace and many other forces are meeting at this moment.

As for the Infinite Heavenly Palace, they felt that they couldn't count on it.

The key is that they must also block the invasion and consume the number of Dao Void Demons, otherwise they will be blamed over there, and the Wuji Heavenly Palace can take them for their errands, and they will be the unlucky.

meeting.

Tai Su Dao: "According to the investigation, this time the Supreme Dao Void Demon sent thirteen sixfold Supreme Dao realms, more than eight hundred fifth-fold Supreme Dao realms, thirty-four thousand four-fold Supreme Dao realms, hundreds of thousands of three-fold Supreme Dao realms, and millions of Supreme Dao demons. This scale is okay, not too big. We dispatched some of our strength, and we could barely bear it. "

"I hope that the Supreme Dao Void Demon will not send any more troops, otherwise we will suffer heavy losses!"

"According to our understanding, the Supreme Void Demon has also invested a lot of troops in other battlefields, and it is not yet the time when the calamity comes, so they will not send a large number of troops. But once tens of thousands of Dao Era years have passed, then we will be in trouble!"

And the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, who understood the actual situation, knew that they had to attack the Infinite Heavenly Palace during this period, otherwise they would be dead in the future.

Subsequently.

They began to command the battle, allowing the Supreme Dao Realm on the third-level battlefield to block the Dao Void Demons.

......

Somewhere in the realm of truth.

Ye Tian was arranged here by Taisu Palace, sitting here, once he found that there was a Supreme Dao Void Demon or a Supreme Dao Demon nearby, he would stop it at all costs.

He is a one-level supreme realm cultivator, because he is assigned among many one-level supreme realms.

Because their cultivation is too low, they can only block cannon fodder like the Supreme Dao Demon, and if they encounter the Supreme Dao Void Demon, they can only choose to flee for their lives.

Ye Tian didn't want to act with these Yizhong Dao Realms, he was ready to act alone.

His purpose is to kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and only by killing the Supreme Dao Void Demon can he obtain the gift of the Heaven and Earth Origin, and it is useless to kill more Supreme Dao Demons.

Airplanes!

There is news of rescue, and it is obvious that the Supreme Dao Void Demon or the Supreme Dao Demon has come here.

Swish!!!!

A Venerable Supreme Dao Realm dispatched to rescue or block the Dao monsters.

Ye Tian was naturally also dispatched, and he went directly to the area where there might be a Supreme Dao Void Demon.

It didn't take long.

He found the six-headed Supreme Dao Void Demon, apparently the Supreme Dao Void Demon Squad.
